title: Cozy Sumac Wrap
description: A peppery and silky Mediterranean dish featuring sumac that is cozy and low-fat-friendly, perfect for a snack or light meal.

ingredients.name: cooking spray for wrap toasting
ingredients.notes: to add a bit of crunch

instructions: Toast whole wheat wraps lightly with cooking spray.
Slice tomatoes and avocados into thin slices or wedges.
Prepare mixed greens by washing, drying, tearing, and gently dressing with olive oil dressing.
Assemble wraps with the following layers: a wrap piece, mixed greens, tomato slices, avocado slices, red onion, and feta cheese (if using).
Fold and secure the wraps to serve.
